name: Congolese Chamber of Commerce in Great Britain [CCCGB]
description: Based in London, bridges the UK and the DR Congo in trade, business and investments. Aims to be the first point of strategic support for any UK-based company wishing to invest in the DRC. Focused on attracting qualitative investments that benefit investors and the local population in the DRC.

tavily.query: Congolese Chamber of Commerce in Great Britain [CCCGB]
